{"task":"Cap buyer review reminder modal to two impressions per request and suppress it completely after a review already exists or has been submitted locally.","agent":"coder","success":true,"quality":0.95,"keywords":["cap","buyer","review","reminder","modal","two","impressions","per","request","suppress","completely","review","already","exists","submitted","locally"]}

App-first mobile performance pass completed. Implemented lazy route helpers and converted buyer/seller/shared/onboarding/public/web routes to Suspense-based lazy loading. Added RoutePrefetcher with idle prefetch for buyer/seller core flows. Introduced nativePlugins adapter with dynamic imports for Capacitor camera/geolocation/push/haptics and removed static plugin imports from mounted mobile components. Added lazy map wrappers for ServiceLocationMap and LocationPickerMap so BuyerHome compose, request detail, request summary, and seller mission card no longer statically pull Mapbox. Updated Vite manualChunks to split react, app-core, ui-vendor, forms-data, framer-motion, capacitor, experience-vendor, and mapbox-gl. Build improved from prior main chunk ~863.63kB to ~159.99kB while keeping shell motion intact. Remaining large warning is isolated deferred mapbox-gl chunk (~1.62MB).

{"task":"Fix remaining map regressions in static request maps, seller mission mode, and seller service-area location picker.","agent":"coder","success":true,"quality":0.9,"keywords":["fix","remaining","map","regressions","static","request","maps","seller","mission","mode","seller","service-area","location","picker"]}

Resolved remaining shared-map regressions by restoring a static ring overlay for non-interactive map images, relaxing mission-mode live map touch handling for mobile/webview use, broadening request coordinate normalization to include location_lat/location_lng, and hardening the seller service-area picker with repeated resize stabilization plus drag-based center selection.

{"task":"Improve seller service-area map touch scrolling usability by simplifying gestures and removing tap-to-recenter conflicts.","agent":"codex","success":true,"quality":0.85,"keywords":["improve","seller","service-area","map","touch","scrolling","usability","simplifying","gestures","removing","tap-to-recenter","conflicts"]}

{"task":"Make seller service-area radius stay geographically truthful while zooming by moving the radius visualization into native Mapbox circle layers.","agent":"codex","success":true,"quality":0.88,"keywords":["make","seller","service-area","radius","stay","geographically","truthful","while","zooming","moving","radius","visualization","native","mapbox","circle","layers"]}

Built mobile admin cockpit routes/screens (home, activity, settings, support detail), converted completion flow from QR to 6-digit code UX, redirected buyer history to activity, removed dead buyer history screen, and switched review-related cache invalidations to buyer-activity. Verified with npm run build. Remaining polish item: BuyerActivity still has one legacy load-error string that could be normalized in a later encoding-safe rewrite.

{"task":"Develop admin operations surfaces, improve buyer and seller settings, retire buyer history in favor of activity, convert completion flow to 6-digit code UX, and verify production build.","agent":"codex","success":true,"quality":0.88,"keywords":["develop","admin","operations","surfaces","improve","buyer","seller","settings","retire","buyer","history","favor","activity","convert","completion","flow","6-digit","code","verify","production","build"]}

{"task":"Restore missing admin activity screen expected by admin routes and verify the production build.","agent":"codex","success":true,"quality":0.9,"keywords":["restore","missing","admin","activity","screen","expected","admin","routes","verify","production","build"]}

{"task":"Grant admin role to admin@test.com in Supabase user_roles and verify resulting roles.","agent":"codex","success":true,"quality":0.95,"keywords":["grant","admin","role","admin","test","com","supabase","user","roles","verify","resulting","roles"]}

Granted admin role to admin@test.com by inserting admin into public.user_roles for user id a90300dc-e0b3-432c-8161-e196eaeebc19. Existing roles retained: admin, user, buyer, buyer_individual. No profile.user_type change was made to avoid disrupting non-auth legacy logic.

Fail-closed production hardening pass completed for Maintmena shared mobile surfaces. Tightened auth resolution in useAuth to await role fetch before clearing loading, updated ProtectedRoute to reject unresolved roles on allowed-role routes, restricted shared /app/settings, /app/help, and /app/support routes to buyer/seller only, removed admin/internal/version wording from shared help UI, and rewrote help content to be curated separately for buyers and sellers. Also hardened FloatingNav to derive admin tabs only from an actual admin role rather than URL context.
